title: milium multiflorum var. thomasii
intro: Milium multiflorum var. thomasii, also known as milium or sweet milium, is a flowering plant that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions like acne, eczema, and dermatitis. Milium multiflorum var. thomasii can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or ointment, and is often used topically to soothe and heal skin irritations and wounds.
